heading: Amendment, modification, or repeal of other laws
label: 1303 Amendment, modification, or repeal of other laws
text: Nothing in this subchapter or subchapter II shall be deemed to amend, modify, or repeal the Acts of (), (), (), (), and (), and Acts amendatory thereof or supplementary thereto.July 26, 1866July 9, 1870March 3, 1877June 17, 1902December 22, 194414 Stat. 25116 Stat. 21719 Stat. 37732 Stat. 38858 Stat. 887
